expectedAppealCitations: Attempted trial of medical management under local gynaecologist with Tab. Deviry (Medroxyprogesterone acetate) 10mg OD for 6 months (Jan 2023 to June 2023)
Documented hemoglobin drop to 7.8 gm% in Sept 2023. Treated with 2 doses of IV Iron Sucrose (Inj. Orofer S 100mg in 100ml NS)
USG Pelvis (10-Oct-2023): Bulky uterus measuring 11.8 x 7.6 x 6.4 cm. Evidence of a well-defined anterior wall intramural fibroid measuring 7.2 cm x 6.5 cm, causing mass effect on the bladder
